characters.name: Mr. Hargrove
characters.personality: Formal, guarded, efficient. Maintains composure under pressure but becomes sharper when cornered.
characters.knowledge: Knows the full truth. Found the testament, read it, hid it to preserve his authority.

characters.name: Lady Ashworth
characters.personality: Direct, observant, increasingly impatient. Suspects foul play but lacks proof.
characters.knowledge: Does not know the truth as fact. Suspects the steward is deliberately delaying. Cannot prove it.
